case_title: GERRI A WILSON ET AL VS. TRIVIDIA HEALTH, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, GERRI A FEESE, LYNETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRIVIDIA HEALTH, INC.
